Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Medication Therapy Management Enrollment │ May 2024│ V 1.3 
23 
OPT_OUT_DT 
LABEL: 
Date of MTM program opt-out 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the date the beneficiary opted out of the Medication Therapy Management (MTM) 
program, if applicable. 
TYPE: 
DATE 
LENGTH: 
9 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
CMS created the MTM file from information submitted by Part D plan sponsors to CMS’s Health
